title: Crispy Lamb Stir Fry
description: A quick and flavorful Vietnamese-inspired stir fry with crispy lamb, served with a side of stir-fried vegetables.

ingredients.name: stir-fry vegetables
ingredients.notes: such as bell peppers, carrots, and broccoli

instructions: Heat the garlicky oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add the lamb and cook until browned, about 3-4 minutes.
Remove the lamb from the skillet and set aside.
Add the crispy garlic to the skillet and cook for 1 minute.
Add the stir-fry vegetables to the skillet and cook until tender, about 3-4 minutes.
Return the lamb to the skillet and stir in the soy sauce, fish sauce, and sugar.
Cook for an additional 1-2 minutes, until the lamb is coated in the sauce.
Season with black pepper to taste.
Serve the crispy lamb stir fry hot, garnished with additional crispy garlic if desired.
